'''√r-w-k''' ('''karawak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:madefy|madefy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:madefy|madefy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √r-w-k
|-
! Lemma
| karawak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thirawak || jirawak || shirawak || kirawak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthurawak || jujurawak || shushurawak || kukurawak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thurawak || jurawak || shurawak || kurawak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thurawak || jurawak || shurawak || kurawak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || therawak || jerawak || sherawak || kerawak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothorawak || jojorawak || shoshorawak || kokorawak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thorawak || jorawak || shorawak || korawak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thorawak || jorawak || shorawak || korawak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rawak || rawak || rawak || rawak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rawak || rawak || rawak || rawak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rawak || rawak || rawak || rawak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rawak || rawak || rawak || rawak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thærawak || jærawak || shærawak || kærawak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thatharawak || jajarawak || shasharawak || kakarawak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || tharawak || jarawak || sharawak || karawak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || tharawak || jarawak || sharawak || karawak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || sharawak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || gosharawak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokisharawak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || sharawaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gosharawaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokisharawaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || sharawakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gosharawaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokisharawakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || sharawakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gosharawaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokisharawakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || sharawakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gosharawaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokisharawakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || sharawaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gosharawaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokisharawaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || sharawakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gosharawaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokisharawakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || sharawakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gosharawaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokisharawakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || sharawakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gosharawaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokisharawakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || sharawaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gosharawaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokisharawaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || sharawaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharawaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharawaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || sharawaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gosharawaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharawaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || sharawakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gosharawaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokisharawakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || sharawakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharawaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharawakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || sharawakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gosharawaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharawakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || sharawakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gosharawaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokisharawakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || sharawakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gosharawaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokisharawakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || sharawakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gosharawaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokisharawakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || sharawakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gosharawaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokisharawakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || sharawakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gosharawaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokisharawakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || sharawakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gosharawaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokisharawakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
